name: Oficina SOAT - Saga e Ordem de Servico Lab
description: Dashboard New Relic para acompanhar a Saga da Ordem de Servico no ambiente lab. Substitua accountIds [0] pelo ID da conta New Relic antes de importar.

pages.name: Saga OS
pages.description: Visao de eventos, traces e logs do fluxo principal da Ordem de Servico.

rawConfiguration.text:
## Oficina SOAT - Saga e OS

Antes de importar, substitua todas as ocorrencias de `"accountIds": [0]` pelo ID numerico da sua conta New Relic.

Este dashboard usa `oficina-os-service` como orquestrador e combina `Span` e `Log`. As consultas de eventos assumem logs estruturados contendo `domainEventType`, `eventType`, `correlationId`, `ordemServicoId` e, quando aplicavel, `sagaId`, `saga.etapa`, `saga.estado` e `saga.duracaoMs`. `eventType` e o campo canonico dos logs dos pods; `domainEventType` e o alias consultavel no New Relic quando `eventType` for reservado na ingestao.

nrqlQueries.query: FROM Log SELECT count(*) AS 'iniciadas' WHERE service.name = 'oficina-os-service' AND service.namespace = 'oficina' AND deployment.environment = 'lab' AND (domainEventType = 'ordemDeServicoCriada' OR eventType = 'ordemDeServicoCriada' OR message LIKE '%ordemDeServicoCriada%')

FROM Log SELECT count(*) AS 'sucesso' WHERE service.name = 'oficina-os-service' AND service.namespace = 'oficina' AND deployment.environment = 'lab' AND (domainEventType = 'sagaFinalizadaComSucesso' OR eventType = 'sagaFinalizadaComSucesso' OR message LIKE '%sagaFinalizadaComSucesso%')

FROM Log SELECT count(*) AS 'compensadas' WHERE service.name = 'oficina-os-service' AND service.namespace = 'oficina' AND deployment.environment = 'lab' AND (domainEventType = 'sagaCompensada' OR eventType = 'sagaCompensada' OR message LIKE '%sagaCompensada%')

FROM Log SELECT count(*) AS 'falha manual' WHERE service.name = 'oficina-os-service' AND service.namespace = 'oficina' AND deployment.environment = 'lab' AND (saga.estado = 'FALHA_MANUAL' OR message LIKE '%FALHA_MANUAL%')

FROM Log SELECT count(*) WHERE service.namespace = 'oficina' AND deployment.environment = 'lab' AND domainEventType IN ('ordemDeServicoCriada', 'diagnosticoIniciado', 'diagnosticoFinalizado', 'orcamentoGerado', 'orcamentoAprovado', 'orcamentoRecusado', 'execucaoIniciada', 'execucaoFinalizada', 'pagamentoSolicitado', 'pagamentoConfirmado', 'pagamentoRecusado', 'ordemDeServicoEntregue', 'sagaFinalizadaComSucesso', 'sagaCompensada') FACET domainEventType LIMIT 30

widgets.title: Eventos da Saga ao longo do tempo

nrqlQueries.query: FROM Log SELECT count(*) WHERE service.namespace = 'oficina' AND deployment.environment = 'lab' AND domainEventType IN ('ordemDeServicoCriada', 'sagaFinalizadaComSucesso', 'sagaCompensada') FACET domainEventType TIMESERIES

widgets.title: Duracao das rotas de OS p95

nrqlQueries.query: FROM Span SELECT percentile(duration.ms, 95) AS 'p95 ms' WHERE service.name = 'oficina-os-service' AND service.namespace = 'oficina' AND deployment.environment = 'lab' AND (span.kind = 'server' OR span.kind = 'SERVER') AND (http.route LIKE '%ordens%' OR http.target LIKE '%ordens%' OR name LIKE '%ordens%') FACET http.route TIMESERIES

FROM Span SELECT latest(trace.id) AS 'traceId', latest(http.route) AS 'rota', max(duration.ms) AS 'duracao max ms' WHERE service.name = 'oficina-os-service' AND service.namespace = 'oficina' AND deployment.environment = 'lab' AND (http.route LIKE '%ordens%' OR http.target LIKE '%ordens%' OR name LIKE '%ordens%') FACET correlationId LIMIT 50

FROM Log SELECT average(saga.duracaoMs) AS 'media ms', percentile(saga.duracaoMs, 95) AS 'p95 ms' WHERE service.name = 'oficina-os-service' AND service.namespace = 'oficina' AND deployment.environment = 'lab' AND saga.etapa IS NOT NULL AND saga.duracaoMs IS NOT NULL FACET saga.etapa TIMESERIES

FROM Log SELECT latest(timestamp) AS 'ultimo log', latest(correlationId) AS 'correlationId', latest(traceId) AS 'traceId', uniques(domainEventType) AS 'eventos' WHERE service.namespace = 'oficina' AND deployment.environment = 'lab' AND ordemServicoId IS NOT NULL FACET ordemServicoId LIMIT 50

FROM Log SELECT latest(timestamp) AS 'ultimo log', latest(message) AS 'mensagem', latest(traceId) AS 'traceId', count(*) AS 'linhas' WHERE service.namespace = 'oficina' AND deployment.environment = 'lab' AND correlationId IS NOT NULL FACET correlationId, service.name LIMIT 50
FROM Log SELECT count(*) WHERE service.namespace = 'oficina' AND deployment.environment = 'lab' AND outbox.status IS NOT NULL FACET service.name, outbox.status LIMIT 30

widgets.title: Erros relacionados a eventos e Saga

nrqlQueries.query: FROM Log SELECT latest(timestamp) AS 'quando', latest(message) AS 'mensagem', latest(domainEventType) AS 'domainEventType', latest(correlationId) AS 'correlationId' WHERE service.namespace = 'oficina' AND deployment.environment = 'lab' AND (level = 'ERROR' OR level = 'FATAL' OR message LIKE '%Saga%' OR message LIKE '%Outbox%' OR message LIKE '%Evento nao suportado%') FACET service.name LIMIT 50
